pages.text: $(o)"The earth has veins; ore is its coagulated blood."$()$(br2)Initiation gift of the Miners' School. The first scroll a new member receives — the world parts its stone walls for you, just once.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Scan a $(l)24-block$() sphere around the core for all vanilla ores (coal, iron, gold, copper, lapis, redstone, emerald, diamond) and highlight each with a per-type color for $(l)30 seconds$().$(br2)Caster also gains Night Vision.$(br2)Cost: $(l)300$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Best value/mana ratio in the codex.$(br2)Color map: diamond cyan, emerald jade, gold amber, lapis blue, redstone red, copper orange, iron tan, coal black.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 1 Dormant$() works.
